reviews.author: Oliver Sang
reviews.summary:
reviewer noted that the patch causes a regression in stress-ng.switch.ops_per_sec by 67.7%, and requested further testing to confirm if this is the right direction

The reviewer, Oliver Sang, noted that a different patch also recovers the regression and suggested testing this new direction.

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch addresses a performance regression in stress-ng's switch.ops_per_sec test, which saw a 67.7% decrease in throughput. The solution involves a new approach that is similar to version 2 of the patch, but without requiring additional testing of version 3. The goal is to determine if this direction is correct and warrants further exploration.
